entry.title: Lissy93 closed a pull request in web-check
entry.content:
Lissy93 closed Lissy93/web-check#286 · March 23, 2026 15:09
Add GitHub Actions workflow for static content deploymentt #286

This workflow automates the deployment of static content to GitHub Pages on pushes to the master branch.

entry.title: Lissy93 commented on pull request Lissy93/awesome-privacy#448
entry.content:
Lissy93 commented on Lissy93/awesome-privacy#448 · March 23, 2026 10:58
Lissy93 commented Mar 23, 2026
Repo can just be in the format of `[user]/[repo-name]`, e.g. `shingrus/1time.io` (unsure why CI schema check didn't flag this).
